content:
This game lost my respect 
Putting paid Battle pass cards in pvp is not acceptable 😐
I really hope someone adress this in Chinese as its absolutely pay to win 
If this game comes to golbal ppl are not gonna be happy
I've never once seen people use those cards in high level pvp
I even use Rs and SRs more than SSRs
Why you can pass 3-2 to unlock pvp , have translate?

I've seen them so what's your point ?
Regardless of they’re used or not u should understand that any paid item in Pvp are immediately consider P2W
Maybe these ones are useless but in the next battle pass there's gonna be a better cards so what will be your excuse then 😂
Unless it's some absolute broken ass shit, the current ones are probably better
pvp mode is still in beta
they constantly try to balance it
as far as i know the community haven't address the issue you've mentioned  yet
people who don't like pvp mode just don't play it
there is other way for you to exchange pvp currency
True 👍
Yes but my comment was about fair play and balance and not about pvp is good or bad, i don't like pvp but i still play it for rewards

Arent pvp always be p2w in gacha games? 
If it’s not why would people spend

U not wrong 
In the end it's just another gatcha which is going in my bin list xD
Just seems like it's not for you, tis all

Then you might want to consider play other gatcha that dont have pvp.
At least this game is very generous and PVP only require to have one copy. Even f2p can collect them over time. Paying is only speeding up the process.

People need to learn to stop giving advice to other people 
I dont need your advice
and your spreading wrong information about pvp by not saying it heavily depends on your gatcha weapons (cards) to win game
Every match i played someone had at least 2 op sr cards which i don't have then u have the paid cards from battle pass 😂
If you truly love the game you also need to speak about the bad things as that helps the developers 
Praising the game does no good to it
i don't know why but people in the Chinese community seem don't share the same concern as you
so they don't even bring up the concern you've mentioned to the developer at all

I just trying to be polite instead of bluntly tell you to quit the game.
PVP does not rely on dupe which mean F2P can slowly obtain them and that's my point.
If you want the game to be good maybe give constructive opinion instead of saying "aha ppl beating me because of card i dont have"
maybe you can post your concern at 有問必答
Most ppl is complaining the balance of PVP which i think is very hard to balance in a rougelite game
Imagine if they release the other 2 races afterwards

I didn't say beating me 😂
 and I haven't lost single game 
So you're rude after all aren't you 
Look at this photo and tell me some of these cards aren't P2W from paid battle pass.
Talking about f2P 😂
Only 3 them arent?
I still dont get what is your argument
You arent losing and you complain
You mean you want full collection as f2p?
I dont know what is your definition of "rude".  Your first few sentence already very rude as it speaking out loud "dont educate me"

You got so excited that you forgot you started all of this 
I said u now wrong and it's going to my bin list at least for now 
Are u ok 😂😂😂
Sometime it just hard to communicate in english community. Sigh
Ok pardon me I am wrong that saying "all"
But what i mean is majority
Like 90%
Also maybe give contrustive opinion about those card that you cant obtain is op or not
If you dont want a good discussion then we can end the conversation here

I agreed with you that every gatcha game is like that 
I ended the conversation 
You started talking to me again and being aggressive 😂
Ok then let end this conversation
You are the one who talking to me again
With rude tone
Not me
Is ok ,zero said is not bad , just suggestion, english ppl not like p2w, but asia can accept , and mt is f2w game , good sugestion , let it end
If u have problem , go to <#1180845276823564288> say , thet use google translate is easy , just say u want
Traditional Chinese ?
Use english maybe is ok

I completely understand the issue Zero is trying to raise (I don't play PvP modes in most games, mind you).
However, I can also understand that games released in Asian servers wont really mind paying for small stuff like this, they're usually the biggest revenue generator for most games.
The company behind this will have to make money for the game to continue, btw I don't see this game coming out in Global servers with English translation <@1115571459599908955>.
(That's a discussion for another time unless the studio already announced they will, but I doubt they will want to).

If the guys that the game has been released for aren't really complaining, then it means it is not an issue (yet) and like they've said, the mode is still on beta so you can make suggestions as you're doing.

To be honest I'm casual players and i dont really care 😄🙂
But as you and jackpot said I'm happy to give my suggestion
Tks you to give suggestion let they know
hi!! can someone translate it? (without translator, i don't understand what that trying to say 😭😭)

"Give me your head. It will definitely become one of my precious collections." A rainy town, a headless corpse.  What hides the mystery is the ambiguity from another dimension.  And that unfinished transaction is still going on.
 Her [most precious collection] will bring the so-called wealth and power when the enemy dies.
THANK YOU SO MUCHHHHH
Just a new character preview
i tried to understand what 死亡時會 帶來那所調的財富與力 mean exactly
thank youuuu 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏
Is she ,if u want, can save some money
i wonder what is her kit
Is that the next banner ? 😲
yes

Ok i have 15 pulls and 5000 crystals
Wait even more cuz i haven't bought tickets from pvp store
you don't even know her kit yet and you still decide to pull her 😆

No way I'm pulling her without seeing her abilities lol
But i believe she's important in the story
hey any guide
english guide
not that i know of
is there an auto feature in this game?
auto-farm resources
after you clear resources mode with 3 star you can sweep that mode
just press 重現 button
is there a tier list?
i manage to get 4 SSR deep sea units
including the cthulu boy
<@391349353354231809> i can help u to create a deep sea team , give me picture

If you play story mode u already know that the buffs u get can turn your bad character to good character 
Its all about the buffs and cards u equip for your character
k
Ok
U can still use start four chacter, or create one deep sea team but not best
If u have she,u can cteate well team
Just use start four is ok,they are ez to up lv, and some mission need use them
Starting four? You mean SR ones?
Right
sr=ssr sr just ez to up lv
Oh

you can use cthulu boy as damage dealer
 if you can get one more copy of him, he can be really good at sweep dungeon
the skill that cost 4 energy become aoe
i saw her during the stpry and I immediately liked her design choice. I'm glad she's the next character. I've been really enjoying purple lately, they're my go to.
Well
you can use sr little boy as tank
She is dameger
Lol, having 2 damager from Purple. Lol

deep sea girl and the pink hair sr are both healer 
deep sea girl heal less but provide revive once per battle
pink hair sr heal much more
just choose one of them as your team healer
Well
the woman with helmet is debuffer causing poison
The best purple team
the sr girl with hat could be a nice pick for your last spot on your team
You should probably tell him that later, he'll need to invest more in shielding than healing depending on the team?
Or am I wrong ?
Im so confused why i can't play as red or purple characters in pvp
Because its in beta?
Hard to balance
her bust can add one card from your deck to your hand and turn the cost to zero

Oh so they listened to my suggestion 
I wasn't happy before  😂
Hopefully they remove the p2w cards from battle pass too
Idw

Hats of to the developers 
They working so hard to make fair to play game
I just know red and purple mechanism is more complex

And now everyone is at the same level while before u see level 40 against 50
I wish every game do it this way
What's that reward?
if u pass C4 u can get C5 yourself skill
skill can add power
